Refresh the page automatically with powerful page monitor features.

Auto Refresh Plus comes in handy to any user who needs to perform automatic web page refresh at certain times efficiently. It also provides content detection support, which is useful when monitoring content included in a dynamic web page.

⭐ Key Features

🔹 Refresh Controls
(1) Predefined Time Intervals
(2) Custom Refresh Interval
(3) Random Interval
(4) Countdown Timer (with scheduling)
(5) Visual Timer (domain-specific position)
(6) Hard Refresh / Bypass Cache
(7) Refresh Count Limit
(8) Stop / Pause / Restart on User Interaction

🔹 URL & Tab Automation
(9) Auto Start URLs
(10) Refresh Predefined URL
(11) Active Tabs List
(12) URL Changes & Redirection Handling
(13) Captcha Detection
(14) Error Page Detection
(15) Prevent System Sleep

🔹 Page Monitor
(16) Page Monitor (Keyword Found / Lost / Change)
(17) Monitoring Modes
(18) Change Detection Method
(19) Predefined Keywords
(20) Keyword Templates
(21) Supported Expressions
(22) Continue Refresh After Detection
(23) Real-Time Detection
(24) Run Detection After Load

🔹 Advanced Monitoring
(25) Custom Area Monitoring
(26) Highlight Detected Keyword
(27) Scroll to Keyword
(28) Auto Click Detected Elements

🔹 Alerts & Notifications
(29) Push Notifications
(30) Email Alerts
(31) Webhook Integration
(32) Window Focus on Detection

🔹 Automation Tools
(33) Custom Scripts

(35) Script Marketplace
(36) Hotkeys

(38) AI Expression Generator

(40) Primary Device
(41) Secondary Devices
(42) Settings Profiles


⭐ Features Detailed explanations

🔹 Refresh Controls

(1) Predefined Time Intervals  
Predefined Time Intervals allow you to quickly select common refresh timings without manually configuring values. This is useful for users who want a fast and simple setup using standard intervals. It ensures consistent refresh behavior and reduces the time required to configure settings.

(2) Custom Refresh Interval  
Custom Refresh Interval gives you full control over refresh timing by allowing you to define exact hours, minutes, and seconds. It supports very short intervals for high-frequency monitoring tasks. This is ideal when precise timing is required for tracking fast-changing content.

(3) Random Interval  
Random Interval refreshes pages at varying times within a defined range. This helps simulate natural browsing behavior and avoids predictable refresh patterns. It is especially useful when monitoring systems where fixed intervals are not recommended.

(4) Countdown Timer  
Countdown Timer allows you to start refresh after a delay or at a specific date and time. It also supports scheduling to run refresh tasks only during selected time windows. This feature is useful for timed events such as sales, ticket releases, or booking openings.

(5) Visual Timer  
Visual Timer displays a live countdown directly on the webpage so you can monitor refresh activity easily. The position of the timer can be customized and is saved per domain. This eliminates the need to open the extension popup repeatedly.

(6) Hard Refresh / Bypass Cache  
Hard Refresh forces the browser to reload content directly from the server instead of using cached data. This ensures that you always get the most up-to-date version of the page. It is essential for real-time monitoring where cached content may cause delays.

(7) Refresh Count Limit  
Refresh Count Limit allows you to define how many times a page should refresh before stopping automatically. This helps prevent unnecessary refresh cycles and reduces system load. It is useful for controlled monitoring tasks.

(8) Stop / Pause / Restart on User Interaction  
This feature automatically pauses or stops the refresh when the user interacts with the page, such as clicking or typing. It prevents interruptions during manual usage. Improved controls also allow you to pause and restart refresh cycles without resetting progress.


🔹 URL & Tab Automation

(9) Auto Start URLs  
Auto Start URLs automatically begin refreshing when specific pages are opened in the browser. It supports wildcard patterns, allowing flexible configuration across multiple pages. This removes the need to manually start refresh each time.

(10) Refresh Predefined URL  
Refresh Predefined URL allows you to refresh a specific page even if it is not actively opened. This enables background monitoring without switching tabs. It is useful for continuously tracking important pages.

(11) Active Tabs List  
Active Tabs List displays all tabs where refresh tasks are currently running. It allows you to view timers, switch between tabs, and manage refresh actions easily. This feature is helpful when handling multiple monitoring sessions.

(12) URL Changes & Redirection Handling  
This feature ensures that refresh continues correctly even when a page redirects or changes its URL. It supports domain-specific configuration for better control. This is especially useful for login pages or dynamic websites.

(13) Captcha Detection  
Captcha Detection identifies when a page shows a captcha challenge during refresh. It stops the refresh process or alerts the user to avoid unnecessary loops. This helps maintain controlled and safe monitoring behavior.

(14) Error Page Detection  
Error Page Detection detects pages like 404 errors or offline states. When such pages are found, the extension can stop refreshing or notify the user. This prevents wasted refresh cycles on broken pages.

(15) Prevent System Sleep  
Prevent System Sleep keeps your system awake while refresh tasks are running. This ensures continuous monitoring even during long sessions. It is particularly useful when running unattended tasks.


🔹 Page Monitor

(16) Page Monitor  
Page Monitor allows you to track changes on a webpage by detecting when specific text appears, disappears, or when any content changes. It works with both keyword-based and full-page monitoring. This makes it a powerful tool for tracking dynamic updates.

(17) Monitoring Modes  
Monitoring Modes allow you to choose between keyword detection and full-page change detection. This flexibility lets you decide how detailed the monitoring should be. It helps optimize performance and accuracy based on your needs.

(18) Change Detection Method  
Change Detection Method lets you monitor changes using either the visible page content or the source code. This provides flexibility for different types of websites. It ensures reliable detection even for hidden or dynamic elements.

(19) Predefined Keywords  
Predefined Keywords allow you to define text that triggers automatic refresh when detected. This works as an event-based automation trigger. It is useful for tracking availability or updates.

(20) Keyword Templates  
Keyword Templates allow you to save commonly used monitoring keywords. This helps speed up setup for repeated tasks. It also ensures consistency across different monitoring sessions.

(21) Supported Expressions  
Supported Expressions include plain text, Regex, CSS selectors, and XPath. This allows both simple and advanced monitoring configurations. It is suitable for beginners as well as technical users.

(22) Continue Refresh After Detection  
This feature allows refresh to continue even after a keyword is detected. It includes an option to skip repeated detections for better efficiency. This is useful for continuous monitoring scenarios.

(23) Real-Time Detection  
Real-Time Detection checks for changes during the refresh process instead of waiting for completion. This significantly reduces detection delay. It is ideal for fast-changing content.

(24) Run Detection After Load  
Run Detection After Load ensures that monitoring starts only after the page content has fully loaded. It supports a user-defined delay in seconds. This improves accuracy for dynamic websites.


🔹 Advanced Monitoring

(25) Custom Area Monitoring  
Custom Area Monitoring allows you to track only a specific section of a webpage. This reduces false alerts caused by unrelated changes. It is useful for large or complex pages.

(26) Highlight Detected Keyword  
Highlight Detected Keyword visually marks the matched text on the page. This makes it easy to locate the detected content. It is especially helpful on long pages.

(27) Scroll to Keyword  
Scroll to Keyword automatically moves the page to the detected content location. This saves time by eliminating manual searching. It improves user experience.

(28) Auto Click Detected Elements  
Auto Click automatically clicks buttons or links when detected. This works with actionable keywords like “Buy Now.” It enables immediate response to events.


🔹 Alerts & Notifications

(29) Push Notifications  
Push Notifications display instant alerts directly in the browser. They work even when the tab is inactive. This helps users stay updated without constant monitoring.

(30) Email Alerts  
Email Alerts send notifications to your email when an event occurs. It requires setting your email in General Settings and enabling it per page. Gmail is recommended for better reliability.

(31) Webhook Integration  
Webhook Integration sends event data to external systems using HTTP requests. It supports platforms like Discord, Slack, and custom APIs. This enables advanced automation workflows.

(32) Window Focus on Detection  
Window Focus automatically brings the browser to the foreground when a change is detected. This ensures you immediately notice important updates. It is useful when working in other applications.


🔹 Automation Tools

(33) Custom Scripts  
Custom Scripts allow you to run JavaScript during refresh or monitoring events. This enables advanced automation and custom workflows. It is ideal for technical users.

(34) AI Script Generator  
AI Script Generator allows you to create scripts using simple natural language. It removes the need for manual coding. This is perfect for beginners and intermediate users.

(35) Script Marketplace  
Script Marketplace provides ready-to-use automation scripts. Users can install and use them instantly without creating their own. This saves time and simplifies setup.

(36) Hotkeys  
Hotkeys allow you to control extension features using keyboard shortcuts. This speeds up workflow and reduces manual effort. They can be customized from settings.


🔹 Expression Tools

(37) Ready Expressions  
Ready Expressions provide pre-built monitoring patterns for common use cases. They help users get started quickly without writing complex logic. This is useful for both beginners and advanced users.

(38) AI Expression Generator  
AI Expression Generator allows you to create expressions using natural language. It can generate complex patterns like Regex automatically. This simplifies advanced monitoring setups.


🔹 Account & Sync

(39) Sync Settings  
Sync Settings allow you to synchronize all configurations across devices using your account. This ensures consistency and saves setup time. It requires a simple login with email and password.

(40) Primary Device  
Primary Device acts as the main control device. It manages all settings and configurations. Only one primary device is allowed per account.

(41) Secondary Devices  
Secondary Devices connect using a sync key without requiring login. They follow the configuration of the primary device. This makes multi-device setup easy.

(42) Settings Profiles  
Settings Profiles allow you to create multiple configurations for different use cases. You can assign profiles to devices as needed. This provides flexibility and better management.

⭐ Getting started
★ Open a webpage to be Refreshed or monitored.
★ Click the Auto Refresh Plus icon in the browser toolbar.
★ "Select the Time interval" and "Page Monitor " as needed for your case.
★ Click on "Start."
★ For more configuration, please check the extension settings page.

⭐ Use case
★ Competitive monitoring
★ Monitor Price changes
★ Monitor Job offers
★ Monitor Product availability
★ Media monitoring
★ Website error tracking
★ Track numeric data in graphs
★ And many more

⭐ Privacy Policy
•   We do not track any of your data, period.
•   We do not track any websites, website usage, etc.
•   We do not transfer any data to any 3rd party servers/internet

Powerful Extension To Extract E-Mail ID's Automatically From Web Pages. NEW FEATURES: AutoVisit websites and AutoSave Email IDs.

Find email addresses in seconds.

Email Extractor is a powerful email extraction extension for Chrome. Extension automatically fetches valid email IDs from the web page, you can copy paste particular email ids you need or export all of them to a text or CSV file. 

NEW FEATURE 1 : the new automation tool can discovers all email addresses for a specific domain name. Example: if you want to discover email IDs of people working at Email Hunter, you can step the tool to search for any email address ending with hunter.io or emailhunter.io , this job can be done for any website.

NEW FEATURE 2 : you can add a 5 seconds delay when visiting web pages automatically, so you make sure all pages are loaded and all email ID’s are collected, even when JavaScript are delaying the display of the emails ID's.

AUTOMATION with AutoVisit and AutoSave. How it works:
** Automation: allows you to build a queue of up to 1.000 URL that you want to visit. The tool will launch a robot that will visit the requested pages and extract all email addresses found on those webpages.
** AutoSave: this feature will store, in the cloud, all the email IDs found on all the pages you are visiting. 

This plugin fetches email ids from the Source Code and has no relevance to what you see on the front, so for example, if you see 3 email ids on the website, plugin may fetch more if it finds hidden email ids in the source.

Features:
- AutoVisit: build a queue of URL that you want to visit automatically
- Automation: discover all email ID's ending with a specific domain name
- Extract Email Address from Web Pages Automatically
- Auto-save all Email Address in the cloud while you browse any website (cloud storage starting at $9.99/month)
- share your Premium subscription with your colleagues
- Download stored Email IDs
- Extracts Emails on Ajax Pages as well, for example Google Search
- Extracts Cloaked Emails
- Filters for Duplicate Email ID, so you get only Unique ones
- Local Storage
- Export Option to export list of your extracted emails to a text file
- Offline Support (Added as of v1.6 Beta) Needs permission
- Extract Emails from Local HTML Documents
- Extract Emails from Text Files
- Fast, Light(Only 51KB)
- removes duplicate email addresses
- See instructions at: https://www.email-extractor.io/assets/pdf/Email_Extractor-FAQ.pdf

No crappy advertisements, no extra junk.

Pricing: this extension is an inexpensive alternative to Email Hunter , voila norbert , Clearbit Connect or FTL ( find that lead ). On the other hand, you will need a bit of technical knowledge to configure. TIP: use our recommended "recipes"

Note that the extracted ids will be overwritten if you open a new tab and browse to a new page, for this particular situation, switch to the previous tab, plugin will fetch the ids, and you can export them.

Though this plugin accesses your web page information, the only thing which will be extracted is the email ids and that too are stored in your local storage.

Extension is thoroughly tested, if incase anyone encounters any bug, you can get my contact details when you click the "Gear" button on the plugin and I'll make sure its fixed ASAP.

Informal Disclaimer : This extension is not developed with an intention to spam people with your marketing mails, so use it for your personal stuff only.

Secure Chrome using Trinetra Browser Security extension

Trinetra Browser Security extension is an advanced tool designed to help create a safe and secure browsing environment for users. It not only strengthens the security of your online activity but also ensures compliance with best practices in network security. Here's a more comprehensive description of its features:

Deploy Security Policies: Trinetra Browser Security enables organizations to deploy and enforce security policies that safeguard enterprise data and networks.

Improved Security through Compliance Tracking: The extension continuously monitors the compliance of your network with recommended security configurations, helping to maintain a robust defense against cyber threats.

Protection from Harmful URLs: It blocks malicious and harmful URLs, protecting users from potential phishing attacks, malware, and other online threats, allowing for a safer browsing experience.

Enhanced Privacy: Trinetra Browser Security automatically prompts websites to stop tracking your online activities and selling your personal data, ensuring greater privacy while surfing the web.

File Transfer Analysis: It analyzes file transfers to detect any potential risks, ensuring that files shared or downloaded from the internet do not contain malware or malicious content, thus securing your data.

Behavioral Analysis for User Security: The extension regularly reviews your browsing behavior to identify any unusual or potentially dangerous activity. It provides real-time alerts about suspicious behavior, helping users remain aware of potential threats.

Awareness of Malicious Activity: By continuously analyzing user activity and browsing patterns, the extension helps users stay vigilant and informed about malicious activity, empowering them to take timely actions to protect themselves.
Works only with Platina by Formpipe product. Enables opening documents for editing directly from the Platina document server.

This browser extension allows Platina by Formpipe users open or edit documents that are stored in Platina directly from the web browser without necessity to install legacy Platina Client Framework application.
Discover email addresses: enter a domain name and find email IDs in seconds from certain search engines.

Email Finder is a Chrome Extension to discover business email addresses for any Domain Name or any Company.

The tool is very quick and easy to use.

How it works:
Step 1: You provide a domain name (example: @hunter.io)
Step 2: Email Finder searches for email IDs from this domain
Step 3: you copy/paste the discovered email IDs or you download all discovered email addresses in CSV / TXT

This Chrome Extension is an alternative to expensive tools like hunter.io, emailhunter, clearbit, anymailfinder and others.

On the search Email Finder autonavigates on different search engines to get the most updated information on the domain searched.
AliExpress tool for Dropshipping and Shopping. Quick View Sales Trends on the List Page.

👋 👋 AliNiche is a product research tool for AliExpress. 
It gives a comprehensive analysis of every AliExpress product and recommends trending products every day, so you won't be bothered by what to sell next!
You can compare cost and credibility with similar products and suppliers to maximize your profits, and discover Shopify stores that are selling the same item, so to make your decision more considered!
——————————————————————————————————

👋 👋 WHAT ARE ITS MAIN FEATURES?
——————————————————————————————————
📣 1. AliExpress Product Research
With AliNiche, you can simply search by image to find similar products with lower prices and more sales.
For each product, AliNiche shows:
➡️ A quick view including orders, wishlists, price, profit and released date.
➡️ Commodity review analysis and statistics
➡️ Trends of recent orders, wishlists, and prices as a reference of its recent performance.
➡️ A plain and simple breakdown of customer feedback.
➡️ A report of the shipping cost according to multiple logistics options.
➡️ A list of Shopify competitors that are selling the same product for you to know how the competition is.
——————————————————————————————————
📣 2. Smart Product Recommendations
AliNiche provides 2 types of recommendations, one is based on product similarity, while the other is on people's choice.
➡️ You can easily find similar products to your browsing one with AliNiche, and evaluate the creditworthiness of corresponding AliExpress sellers in the meantime.
In this way the prices are compared, and it's reasonable to maximize your profits by reducing the cost.
➡️ If you haven't got an idea of what to sell today, why don't grab a coffee and watch our AI-picked trending products?
We pick out 40 best-sold AliExpress products every day, based on their sales over the past 7 days or 14 days. You can find them by a conspicuous strip on the home page, category page, and search result page.
——————————————————————————————————
📣 3. One-Click To Download Product Videos and Images
We know your next move after finding a favorite product to sell, that is, to list it on your store.
So we provide you with unlimited access to download product images, including video, main images, variant images, and description images, without login!
——————————————————————————————————
📣 4. Search by Image on Aliexpress
You can search for items in AliExpress by image/photo (right click on any image on the webpage and press the button "AliNiche - AliExpress Product Research Tool").
——————————————————————————————————
📣 5. Download Product Reviews
We provide you with unlimited access to download product reviews, including review content, seller shows.
——————————————————————————————————

👋 👋 HOW TO USE IT?
Just install it onto your Chrome browser, visit aliexpress.com, and the extension will execute all for you automatically!
——————————————————————————————————
1. You'll find the best-selling charts on the home page, category page, and search result page.
2. For each result you search, you'll notice an extended table attached to the item like originally, on it are fast facts on the product performance.
3. Click the AliNiche icon which is floating on the items detail page, you will be impressed by the exhaustive analysis of the product and the store.
——————————————————————————————————

👋 👋 👋 👋 👋 👋 👋 👋 👋 👋 
As the best alternative to Alihunter, AliInsider, AliSave, Dsers, AliScraper, AliNiche is THE must-have tool for your dropship business! Try it now!

The term 'AliExpress' is a trademark of AliExpress,Inc. This application uses the AliExpress API but is not endorsed or certified by AliExpress

해외구매대행 상품등록을 도와주는 헤이셀러입니다.
중국어 자동 번역, 국내 최다 오픈마켓 업로드 지원 합니다!

결제 하지 않아도 업로드하였던 
상품관리는 무료로 이용하실 수 있습니다:)


✅ 헤이셀러을 사용하기 위해서 필수 다운로드인가요?

헤이셀러에서는 대량파싱 (URL 삽입) 과 웹파싱기능을 제공합니다.
웹파싱기능을 사용하기 위해서 필수로 설치해주셔야 합니다.

크롬 브라우저를 통해 확장앱 설치 후
타오바오 상품 파싱이 가능합니다.

✅ 웹파싱이 무엇인가요?

기존 대량파싱은 프로그램에 URL 을 대량으로 삽입하여 파싱하는 기술입니다.
장점은 짧은시간내 많은 상품이 파싱 가능하다는점이 있습니다.

웹파싱은 그에 비해 
타오바오 웹페이지에서 아이콘 클릭 한번으로 바로 수집이 되는 기능입니다.
장점은 상품을 보는 즉시 수집이 가능하다는점이 있습니다.
그리고 웹페이지에 보이는 가격 그대로 파싱이 됩니다.

각 파싱마다 장단점이 있으니, 편리한 방식을 선택해서 이용하시면 됩니다 !


✅ 이용방법

1. 헤이셀러 회원가입 (https://heyseller.kr)
2. 크롬에서 웹파싱 확장앱 설치
3. 웹파싱 확장앱에서 헤이셀러 아이디 / 비밀번호 로그인하여 연동
4. 타오바오 페이지에서 우측 확장앱 아이콘 클릭하여 상품파싱
5. 헤이셀러 프로그램에서 “상품찾기” 새로고침

자세한 내용은 헤이셀러 채널톡 가이드북을 참고해주세요!

Enhance your streaming experience with just one click
Analytics & Ad Blocker: Open Source Privacy Firewall
An extension for privacy and security for the internet.

Analytics & Ad Blocker: The Ultimate Open-Source Privacy Firewall

Take total control of your browser. Block ads, disable scripts, and visualize your carbon footprint with a professional-grade, open-source toolkit.

Analytics & Ad Blocker is an open-source browser firewall that blocks ads and tracking scripts, lets you control heavy page resources, and shows what third parties try to load on the sites you visit. It is designed for people who want transparency, local processing, and granular controls instead of black-box blocking.

Key features

Ad and tracker blocking: Blocks many common advertising and tracking requests
Custom network request blocking: Create rules to block specific domains, URLs, or scripts

Toggle content types: Quickly disable JavaScript, images, or videos to speed up pages and reduce load

Live tracker dashboard: View third-party activity and request behavior in real time across tabs

Local-first privacy: Blocking decisions and dashboard insights are processed on your device

Open-source integrity: No paid whitelisting and no acceptable ads program
Live tracker dashboard details. Use the dashboard to understand what a page is doing behind the scenes.

Live tag monitoring: See tracker tags and third-party requests as they attempt to run

Data audit visibility: Identify which sites are most aggressive with third-party connections

Impact metrics: Correlate blocked requests with lighter page behavior for everyday performance gains.

Extension Analysis: Have the ability to vet another extension to see if it is safely using permissions. Download source code for additional analysis.

🛠 Total Granular Control (New Features)
Go beyond basic ad blocking. Our advanced toolkit allows you to toggle specific web elements on the fly to maximize speed and minimize energy consumption:

Block Custom Network Requests: Create your own rules to stop specific domains or scripts from ever connecting.

Toggle Content Types: Instantly disable JavaScript, Images, or Videos with a single click—perfect for "Ultra-Low Power" browsing and extreme speed.

Open-Source Integrity: 100% transparent. No "Acceptable Ads" programs, no paid whitelisting. Check our code on GitHub and contribute to the mission.

Stops common trackers and analytics tags from loading so you share less data by default

Reduce page bloat by blocking unwanted network requests and optionally heavy resources

Help you identify which websites load the most third-party scripts and requests
Improves browsing focus by removing ad interruptions

📊 The Live Tracker Dashboard
See exactly what’s happening behind the scenes. Our Custom Dashboard provides a real-time visualization of your privacy:

Live Tag Monitoring: Watch exactly how tracker tags (Google, Adobe, Yahoo) try to fire across all your open tabs.

Impact Metrics: See the direct correlation between blocked scripts and your reduced carbon footprint.

Data Audit: Identify which websites are the "hungriest" for your data and your device's energy.

View Other Extension Permissions: Have the ability to use AI analysis to identify if an extension is using their requested permissions appropriately.

🚀 Why We Outperform the Rest
By combining the light footprint of uBlock Origin with the deep insights of Ghostery, we offer a unique "Sustainability Suite":

Ad-Free Experience: No banners, no video interruptions, no nonsense.

A greener internet: By blocking JavaScript and heavy media, you drastically reduce CPU/RAM usage, extending your laptop’s battery life and lowering CO2 emissions.

Privacy-First Architecture: We never collect your data. All request blocking and dashboard analytics are processed locally on your device.

🌍 A Greener Internet Starts with You
The internet consumes more electricity than many countries. A massive portion of that is wasted on tracking scripts you never asked for. Analytics & Ad Blocker lets you opt-out of the waste and join the Globemallow.io mission for a sustainable digital future.

Key Features at a Glance:
Advanced Blocking: YouTube Ads, Google Analytics, Social Pixels, and custom CSS/JS.

Performance: Drastically reduces page weight for 2x faster loading.

Transparency: Open-source license.

No Tracking: No accounts, no logs, no cloud-processing.

Stop being a passenger in your own browser. Switch to the open-source ad blocker that gives you the dashboard, the control, and the conscience to browse better.

Frequently asked questions

Does it collect my data?
No. The extension is built to work locally and does not require an account.

Can I block a specific website or script that annoys me?
     Yes. You can add custom blocking rules for domains or specific requests.

Will disabling JavaScript or media break sites?
     Some sites rely on scripts and media. The one-click toggles make it easy to turn         resources off for speed, then turn them back on if a site needs them.

Is it really open source?
Yes. The project is open source so you can review the code, verify behavior, and contribute.

Who is it for?
   Privacy-focused users who want fewer trackers and ads
   Power users who want per-site controls and custom rules
   Anyone who wants faster browsing and fewer unwanted third-party connections
   Take control of what loads in your browser with an open-source ad and analytics    blocker that prioritizes transparency, local processing, and real user control.

Claude powertools - Enhance Your Claude AI Experience

This program will not work with Claude's Projects feature update, as the structure of the site has changed. A new update to match the structure will be coming soon. -3rd July 2024-

Unlock the full potential of your conversations with Claude AI using Claude Powertools, the ultimate extension for power users. This powerful toolbox equips you with advanced features to customize and streamline your Claude experience.

### Key Features:

#### Custom Instruction Injector
- **Effortless Customization:** Easily inject custom instructions or prompts before starting a chat by clicking the blue button next to the prompt input field.
- **Personalized Behavior:** Tailor Claude's responses with your personalized guidelines and preferences. This ensures that Claude behaves exactly how you want it to during conversations.
- **Quick Access:** Save frequently used instructions for quick access and reuse. Your custom instructions are stored locally, making them readily available whenever you need them.

#### Chat History Manager
- **Structured Organization:** Organize your chat conversations into structured groups or categories for better manageability.
- **Topical Grouping:** Get a clear overview of recent and important chats with topical grouping. This helps you quickly find and refer to specific conversations.
- **Easy Navigation:** Easily navigate between chat groups and expand to view more details, maintaining a tidy and well-organized chat history.
- **Enhanced Searchability:** Simplify the process of finding older conversations by grouping them under meaningful categories.

### How to Use:

#### Custom Instructions
1. **Inject Instructions:** Click the blue button next to the prompt input field to open the custom instruction injector.
2. **Enter Instructions:** Type in your custom instructions or prompts.
3. **Save and Reuse:** Save these instructions for future use. They will be stored locally and can be quickly accessed whenever needed.

#### Grouping Conversations
1. **Name Your Groups:** In the chat title, add the group name followed by `::` and then the chat title. For example, `Project Alpha::Meeting Notes` will group the chat under "Project Alpha".
2. **View Groups:** Your conversations will now be displayed in groups, making it easier to manage and find specific chats.

Harness the power of customization, organization, and productivity – install Claude Powertools today and take your Claude AI experience to new heights!

My browser is quite sluggish. What should I do?
The issue with all browsers is that they become sluggish and awkward after a time. Launching, loading websites, and opening and closing tabs all take time.
That is when you should consider removing the web cache, history of visited websites, cookies, and so on.

With just one click, delete all of your cookies, cache, and history in Google Chrome!

Search across 5 JP markets & open items directly in Sendico™ or Buyee™ for easy purchases from Yahoo Auctions™, Mercari™, & more!

New 30 Day Trial Version Available!

*UPDATE* 
-Now with 5 US Market Places including eBay™, Mercari™ USA, Goodwill™ Shopping, Lukie Games and Facebook™ Market Place (must be signed into Facebook in web browser to fully utilize)
-eBay Sold History Search 3 years back(must be signed into  in eBay in your web browser)

Do you use Sendico™ or Buyee™ to purchase items from Japan? Maximize your shopping experience with Japan Shopping Assistant or JSA! Designed to seamlessly integrate with Japan's top online marketplaces, this extension empowers you to effortlessly translate, save, manage and purchase your favorite items across Yahoo Auctions™, Mercari™, Rakuten Rakuma™, Yahoo Shopping™ and Yahoo Flea Market™. Whether you're a casual shopper or a serious collector, Japan Shopping Assistant is your go-to extension for navigating and purchasing from Japan's vast online shopping world. JSA is meant to be used with leading Purchasing and Shipping Proxies, Sendico™ and Buyee™. Instantly opens product pages for Yahoo Auctions™, Mercari™, Rakuten Rakuma™ Yahoo Shopping™ and Yahoo Flee Market™* within Sendico™ and Buyee™ making it easier to purchase items through the Sendico™ and Buyee™ proxy services.

*Yahoo Flea Market™ will only instantly open within Buyee™. You can still order items from Yahoo Flea Market™ with Sendico™, but you will need to use an order form.

*Powerful and easy to use Search Bar + Filter and Wordbank to Save Favorite Search Terms!*
You can now use the actual Marketplace Websites like "https://auctions.yahoo.co.jp/" or "https://jp.mercari.com/" to search for the items instead of finding them through the search engines built into the proxy services. This gives you the same search results that people shopping in Japan see giving you the most accurate search! Once you find the item you are interested in, with just the click of an a button, it will open that item within Sendico™ or Buyee™ where you can bid on or purchase it easier then ever!

I love using Sendico™ and Buyee™ to purchase items from Japan, and after buying thousands of items, I wanted to make a tool that others can use to get the best experience possible if they like to buy from Japan and if use Sendico™ or Buyee™ Shopping and Shipping Proxy Services to purchase their items!

Watch the video for a quick overview of the extension and the premium features offered with the paid version! The Free Version will only open up the item within Sendico™ which is great, but just doesn't have any of the extra features built into the extension that the Premium Version does, such as the keyboard shortcuts, The Market Place Search Bar (with built-in Search Filter and Translate to Japanese search option) or the Keyword List Bank where you can store your favorite Search Terms (in English and Japanese) and recall them later for future searches.

Neither Sendico™ nor Buyee™ had any part of the creation of this Chrome Extension. I was not paid to create this, just wanted to put this out there for anyone who likes to buy items from Japan and may find this useful! I love using them to buy items from Japan so this was built to help people Search and Purchase items easier! There is a Free Version that is limited but works with Sendico™! If you sign up for the Premium Version, Thank you very much! It helps me make tools like this and future videos!

5 US Market Places have been added to the Chrome Extension:
+eBay™
+Mercari™ USA 
+Goodwill™ Shopping
+Lukie Games
+Facebook™ Market Place (must be signed into Facebook™ in web browser to fully utilize)
(These market places are solely for searching results and do not work within Sendico™ or Buyee™)


Ebay™ Sold Listing Button
When the Page loads after your search, it will default to eBay domain, closest to you (in the United States it is ebay.com, in the United Kingdom it is ebay.co.uk)
If you want to search all of the eBay domains worldwide, you must click the dropdown and scroll to the bottom to select "All Sites" and then his "Research" button. This will override whatever filter that was selected (if you choose one of the 5 filter options to filter the eBs results Ex: by Highest Price, Lowest Price etc., after selecting "All Sites" within the dropdown and pressing the "Research" button, it will show the items in default order)
